project.name: DevKey
project.description: Open-source Android keyboard combining power-user features with modern UX, AI prediction, and command-aware autocorrect

current_phase.name: Testing & Bug Fixing — Emulator Audit Fixes Implemented

metadata.session_notes: Session 17: Implemented all 7 emulator audit fix phases + 2 waves code review. Fixed 3 CRITICALs, caught Tab keycode regression. Deleted dead SettingsScreen.kt.
